name: Curry-Laced Tomato-Lentil Broth
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the lentils thoroughly.
2. Place the lentils in a pot with 3 cups of water and turmeric.
3. Cook, partially covered, until very tender (about 30 minutes).
4. Transfer the lentils and 1 cup of water to a deep pot.
5. Whisk to crush some of the lentils.
6. Add the tomatoes, cumin, ground coriander, cayenne, onion, garlic, and salt.
7. Bring to a boil.
8. Lower heat and cook, partially covered, for 10 minutes.
9. Stir in lemon juice.
10. Heat oil in a small skillet until hot.
11. Add mustard seeds (cover so they do not fly out of the pan).
12. Continue stirring until the seeds stop spattering.
13. Mix the mustard seeds into the soup.
14. Stir in chopped fresh coriander.
Makes 6-8 servings.
